about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Welcome
about.intro: I'm Jean Paul Mosquera Arevalo, a Software Engineer, application developer, innovator and researcher. On this website you will find my works and information of interest that allows you to give me an opportunity on your projects and job offers.

testimonials.title: Testimonials
testimonials.subtitle: What people say about my work

q1.quote: Jean understood our business before the code. He shipped a solution our clients adopted from day one — he's not just a great engineer, he thinks like a business partner.
q1.name: John

q2.quote: Working with Jean is working with a peer, not a vendor. Technical skill, attention to detail and the ability to communicate trade-offs clearly: he saved us incidents and production time.
q2.name: Daniel Soto

q3.quote: Jean was one of the most rigorous students I had in the master's program. He combines critical thinking, solid fundamentals and the rare discipline of carrying ideas through to implementation.
q3.name: Ing. Luis Chamba

process.title: Process
process.subtitle: How we'll work together
process.lead: A simple, transparent flow to go from idea to product without losing clarity along the way.

step1.title: Discovery call
step1.description: 30 min to understand your idea, audience and goals. Free, no strings attached.

step2.title: Proposal & plan
step2.description: You receive scope, timeline, milestones and pricing in under 48 h. If we click, we sign and start.

step3.title: Weekly sprints
step3.description: Demo every Friday. You validate, I iterate. Repo and board access from day one.

step4.title: Launch
step4.description: Store / production deployment, technical handover and 2 weeks of post-launch support.
